name: Grand Duelist
bio: A duelist who kills not for honor, but to quiet the chaos within.

skills.name: Blade Dance
skills.description: Deal Physical Damage to opponent equal to 70% of Attack Damage, three times.

skills.name: Strategic Strike
skills.description: Deal Physical Damage to opponent equal to (110% of Attack Damage + 150), then permanently increase Attack Damage, Magic Power, Armor, and Magic Resist by 6% (additively).

skills.name: En Garde!
skills.description: Deal Physical Damage equal to (100% Magic Power + 120), then deal Magical Damage equal to (100% Attack Damage + 120).

skills.name: Enchanted Blade
skills.description: Deal Magical Damage to opponent equal to (120% of Magic Power + 400).

ultimate.name: Judgement Cut
ultimate.description: Repeat 5 times: Deal Magical Damage equal to (18% of Attack Damage + 40), then Physical Damage equal to (18% of Attack Damage + 40), then permanently reduce target's Armor and Magic Resist by 5% (additively).
